title: lobelia oblongifolia
intro: Lobelia oblongifolia, also known as Chinese lobelia or Lobelia, is a plant species within the Campanulaceae family, native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Lobelia oblongifolia include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as pain relief and reduced inflammation. Lobelia oblongifolia is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
